name: Suspicious Powershell Invocation Not Terminated by Behavior Monitoring
description: A suspicious powershell invocation was executed and not blocked by behavior monitoring. This could be indicative of a CobaltStrike beacon download attempt. As the result is pass it suggests that there is a possible product misconfigurtion.

rules.name: Suspicious Powershell Invocation Not Terminated by Behavior Monitoring

author: Jack Walsh
